title: Valluvan Kuralil Sol Eduthen Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Valluvan kuralil sol eduthen
kamban kaviyil kavi eduthaen
elango variyil ezhil eduthaen
paaduvom naam aaduvom

malar indri vandu inam
magizhndhu vazhvadhillai
madhi indri mannulagam
nilaithu iruppadhillai

oli indri poo ulagam
selithu valarvathillai
ennai indri ennullam
sirithu magizhvadhillai

Valluvan kuralil sol eduthen
kamban kaviyil kavi eduthaen
elango variyil ezhil eduthaen
paaduvom naam aaduvom

thunai indri kodigal ellaam
thaaney padarvathillai
nadhi indri naadugal ellaam
valamaai irupathillai

kavi indri isai ellaam
thaenaai inippathillai
kalai indri thalai ullam
paalaai suvaipathillai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of love and devotion, reflecting on the beauty of life and relationships.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie for Valluvan Kuralil Sol Eduthen is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of ML Srikanth and S. Janaki.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Valluvan Kuralil Sol Eduthen beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and devotion through its poignant lyrics and soulful melodies. It evokes a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a time when emotions were expressed with simplicity and depth. The heartfelt rendition by ML Srikanth and S. Janaki adds layers of emotion, making it a perfect piece for moments of reflection. This classic remains a beloved choice for those seeking solace in music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Valluvan Kuralil Sol Eduthen is a timeless classic that resonates with the soul, capturing the essence of nostalgia and devotion. The enchanting vocals of ML Srikanth and S. Janaki bring a unique charm to this piece, making it a cherished gem in Tamil music history. Experience the lyrical beauty and emotional depth that this song offers, transporting you to a different era.
stanzaMeanings: I took words from Valluvan's teachings, I took verses from Kamban's poetry, I took beauty from Elango's verses, we will sing and dance together.
Life cannot be joyful without flowers, the world cannot exist without wisdom.
The world cannot thrive without sound, my heart cannot be happy without you.
I have become one with the lightning, a single song has emerged.
Radha, you have captured my heart a little, Krishna is here.
I took words from Valluvan's teachings, I took verses from Kamban's poetry, I took beauty from Elango's verses, we will sing and dance together.
Without companionship, there is no meaning in life, without rivers, there are no lands to flourish.
Without a poet, music is not sweet, without art, the heart cannot enjoy.
There is no stone in the heart, I thought I fell in love.
Krishna, you have captured my heart a little, Radha is here.
